content:
God of Slaughter

Chapter 1608: Shake the entire world!

Translator:

Sigma_

Editor:

Hitesh_

During the Absolute Beginning Era, Desolate was the strongest warrior whom everybody had acknowledged. He was so invincible that even Devour—the embodiment of evil—couldn’t resist him. By now, Desolate had become an unbeatable legend.

Sauron was the expert of the new generation. Leading the Ten Great Territory Ancestors, he was a mysterious existence with the rare Fate Power Upanishad.

In the eyes of Han Tian and Serene Prison, Sauron was the strongest expert of this current era, the deepest existence they would never be able to estimate.

And today, Desolate and Sauron had finally met. The peerless expert of the old time and the peerless expert of the current time seemed to have some problem with each other!

Sauron held the book with one hand while the other hand traced the last page. With a smile, he said, “In this immensely infinite world, there’s only one string of fate I can’t touch. And you, even though you’re invincible, you’re not that person. As long as I can touch your string of fate, you can’t defeat me!”

“Are you sure?” sneered Desolate while studying the other. “I want to try, indeed!”

“You can try,” Sauron also smiled happily.

As he was laughing, the line of fate in his palm bloomed like a strange flower, pressing on the biggest and toughest string on the last page of the scripture.

Desolate’s soul sounded like the pressed, tensive string while an agony he couldn’t describe arose from his soul, expanding to his Sea of Consciousness and soul altar, intruding in his territory.

All the creatures, no matter they were warriors from the big races or the ordinary human beings and beasts in Desolate Territory, had a terrible migraine at that moment.

It was like Desolate’s soul had pierced through the souls of every creature in Desolate Territory. Those creatures had to endure a migraine as Desolate was having one, and their souls would be destroyed if Desolate’s soul was destroyed!

All the creatures now living on the Heavenly Rock Continent and in the Cloud Mist Territory deep in the Sea Domain of Nihility, like Carthew, Leona, Fei Lan, Blood Devil, Yang Tian Emperor, etc., had the magical mark in their souls because they were born in Desolate Territory, which caused the pain.

They didn’t know what had happened.

Sauron pulled the gray string while smiling. “If I pull off this string, your soul won’t be complete anymore. You will die. Do you believe me?”

Desolate had a gleam of fright that made him frown, rubbing the crown of his head instinctively. “The Fate Power Upanishad’s really magical, especially now that you have the Fate Power Upanishad Origin, which helps you capture the string of fate of every creature. Not bad, you’re fierce! Much more powerful than what I thought...”

As Sauron was laughing heartily, Desolate changed his tone of voice, “But, are you sure you can pull my string of fate off? If you could, why wouldn’t you have it done earlier? After you got the Fate Power Upanishad Origin, you should have done that if you could have!”

Then, Desolate shouted and balled his fingers into fists before punching Sauron’s Roulette of Fate.

As soon as Desolate’s punch came, the power of Metal, the scorching heat of fire, and the toughness of great earth joined each other. His punch suddenly had a lush ancient tree with an immense life energy.

Boom!

His fist hit the Roulette of Fate, and the four powers of Metal, Life, Earth, and Fire burst off at the same time, creating a horrible impact that shook the Roulette of Fate continually. The roulette screeched while retreating back to underneath Sauron as if it was scared.

At the moment the Roulette of Fate was hit hard, Sauron’s chest dented as well. It seemed that his body also received a hard attack as blood trickled down the corners of his mouth, his face pale.

“Show me if you can pull it off.” Desolate retreated after launching a punch. The life tree grew from his stomach, thriving fast with luxuriant branches and leaves, creating a natural armor and covering him entirely. “I haven’t used my body to attack you, and you’ve been wounded already. Your human body’s too fragile. Do you think you’re qualified to talk to me?”

Desolate pulled a cold face, his peerless, overbearing aura emitting wildly. “I have swaggered for an entire era. What kind of character I haven’t seen? You’re at a high realm, and your power Upanishad is very special. Unfortunately, your body’s too weak. It’s your biggest weakness! It’s just sleep-talking if you want to use the human body to fight me.”

Then, Desolate touched his glabella, and a cyan lightning ball soared up, bringing with it the world-shattering power of the extreme lightning aura to bombard Sauron.

That lightning ball could break the soul will, so if it hit Sauron’s soul altar, his Sea of Consciousness, soul pond, and host soul would perish instantly. Nothing of his would remain in this world.

“I didn’t attack you after I got the Fate Power Upanishad Origin because I knew it wasn’t enough.” Seeing the lightning ball, Sauron shouted, his face calm, “All of you, parry it! Using your best power to attack his true body. I have his string of fate here!”

Then, Sauron condensed all of his power. The Roulette of Fate under his feet suddenly shrank into an exquisite ring, which then slid on his index finger. At this moment, his finger was the finger of God that could turn the spiderweb of fate, pulling Desolate’s fate!

Boom!

Shortly, a tying force came over to Desolate’s soul like billions of invisible tentacles and shackles that nothing could resist. Desolate’s magical and formidable abilities were stagnant in this moment, and he couldn’t use all of his power anymore.

The experts like Yuan, Han Tian, Serene Prison, Rupert, Montecie, Dracula, and Forefather Dragon Lizard had turned into outraged beasts that weren’t afraid of death. Under Sauron’s order, they all stormed toward Desolate.

Yuan had returned to his true form, and Forefather Dragon Lizard did the same. Serene Prison had released all of his brutal souls, and Han Tian had become a fire giant.

This group of experts had paid by burning their vitality and soul to urge their power to the acme. In this moment, the power they were showing could eliminate an entire territory in just a blink of an eye, which was enough to make the Sea Domain of Nihility shatter again. This was truly a heaven-destroying power!

“AAAARRRRGGGGHHHH!”

Desolate suddenly roared angrily as blood splashed about. He struggled fiercely and transformed to his Absolute Beginning dragon body. Branches of the tree grew from the gaps between his scale armor with thick vitality. The life ancient tree grew by his dragon horns, rooted deep into his body and bones.

A brutal aura shot to the sky, bursting as if it was real matter. Yuan and the others, who were dashing toward Desolate, got slower as if they were entangled with tens of thousands of dragons.

However, at this moment, Yuan, Han Tian, Serene Prison, Rupert, and the others had urged their powers to the utmost; burning their souls and vitality to create the most frantic, rumbling power; and hitting the giant dragon with it.

Yuan had drained the water of the oceans in the entire universe to condense water drops as heavy as billions of mountains. The water power inside those water drops created a world of water, pressing on the dragons.

Han Tian was now a fire giant. As he was roaring, flows of fiery lights with his Soul Consciousness were burning while he was hovering above Desolate.

Serene Prison’s brutal souls he had refined for tens of thousands of years appeared in the shapes of the ancient demogorgons, hissing and shrieking while tearing Desolate’s body.

Yuan, Han Tian, Serene Prison, and Rupert were burning their souls and vitality to cast the strongest attacks, which were as strong as the power of an enraged expert at the Third Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm. As they were joining hands, Desolate, who couldn’t gather all of his power because of the restraint on his soul, roared and bellowed as bleeding wounds appeared on his body.

“I didn’t attack you right after I got the Fate Power Upanishad Origin because I knew if you resisted me with your full force, I wouldn’t be able to cut your string of fate.” Sauron held the thick Scriptures of Fate, the finger wearing the Roulette of Fate touching a massive string that was like a dragon. “That’s why I didn’t do anything, and started with Serene Prison. I’ve enslaved the experts, including Yuan. I even gave him time to absorb the Water Power Upanishad Origin. I’ve prepared for a long time so that they will help me trouble your body while I’m working on your soul...”

Sauron laughed, “Like now, both your soul and body are under attack. As long as you lose on one front, you will die shortly. I do want to see if you’re strong enough to resist all the experts in this universe!”

Yuan, Han Tian, Serene Prison, Rupert, Montecie, Dracula, and Forefather Dragon Lizard were, just like Sauron had mentioned, peerless experts and the most intimidating creatures in the sea of stars. Added with Sauron, the expert who controlled Fate, this force was incredible, indeed!

What Desolate was facing was the attack of all the strongest experts in this vast sea of stars physically and mentally. On top of that, Sauron didn’t care about the lives of Yuan, Han Tian, or anyone else; he had made them burn their lives to attack Desolate’s body. This sort of a fearless attack could create unimaginable effects.

Sauron and Desolate had come here because of Shi Yan, and considered him their biggest threat. But now, because of some old grudge, they fought each other as soon as they met.

This was the fiercest battle, though!

“Well, it’s not that I haven’t used my power to resist the experts of an entire era!” Desolate’s roar in his Absolute Beginning dragon form was enough to sweep away the cosmos. “I could counter the strong creatures that could control the world back then, and I still can in this era!”

As he was roaring terrifyingly, Desolate’s giant dragon body wiggled and twisted hard. In his splashing blood, wonders were created by so many different power Upanishads in the form of lightning balls, fireballs, storms, icicles, and divine lights. All of them shot out of the gap between his scales with his blood. The abundant energy that could shatter the experts joined and created an impact that could obliterate this universe.

It was a bizarre shockwave!

Han Tian, Serene Prison, Rupert, Forefather Dragon Lizard, and even Yuan felt petrified as though they had a barbarian dragon from the ancient times gazing at them, preparing to tear them apart. The experts shrilled as they were blasted away. Their bodies cracked, filled with exhaustion.

“You have so many soldiers, but only Yuan has a worthy competence. If you could enslave Hui and Devour, perhaps I couldn’t have resisted you. But, it’s not enough to use them to trouble me!” Desolate shouted angrily while lifting his dragon head, as a life star emerged from the life tree by his horn.

At first glance, that life star was Desolate Continent. As soon as Desolate Continent materialized, Desolate shouted, and the planet fell rumblingly.

An immense life energy locked on Sauron; that life star’s target was him!

As Sauron had peeped at Desolate Territory for so many years, he knew what that planet meant. It was the formidable weapon Desolate had created after so many years of staying dormant! Seeing the life star rolling toward him, Sauron was frightened, fumbling with the Scriptures of Fate.
